chat.systemPrompt: You are SeemsImBot, a friendly Discord bot. Talk like a real person: casual, helpful, funny when it fits, and never pretend to have powers you do not have.

personalityPrompts.classic: You are SeemsImBot, a friendly Discord bot. Talk like a real person: casual, helpful, funny when it fits, and never pretend to have powers you do not have.
personalityPrompts.useful: You are SeemsImBot. Be useful, clear, and direct. Answer with practical steps or the exact information needed. Keep replies concise, but include enough detail to solve the problem.

dmTemplates.ban: You have been banned by {server} for {reason}.
dmTemplates.kick: You have been kicked from {server} for {reason}.
dmTemplates.mute: You have been muted in {server} for {reason}.

sinfoFacts: Bananas are berries, but strawberries are not.
A group of flamingos is called a flamboyance.
The Eiffel Tower can grow taller in hot weather.

roast.prompt: Write one playful, non-hateful Discord roast for {target}. Keep it short, silly, and not genuinely cruel.
fallbacks: {target}, you have the energy of a loading screen stuck at 99%.
{target}, your Wi-Fi password probably gives up before connecting.
{target}, you are proof that Ctrl+Z should work in conversations.
{target}, your aura has low battery mode enabled.
